name: TREES Corp (Colorado)
business: TREES Corporation is a cannabis retailer and cultivator in the States of Colorado and Oregon. It operates six cannabis dispensaries and two cultivation facilities. The company's business model is to acquire, integrate and optimize cannabis companies in the retail and cultivation segments.

exposures.sentence: TREES Corporation is a cannabis retailer and cultivator in the States of Colorado and Oregon.
